result.stdout:
Description:
  AutoMappic CLI - Mapping validation and visualization tool.

Usage:
  AutoMappic.Cli [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  validate <project>   Validates all mapping declarations in a project.
  visualize <project>  Generates a mapping graph visualization.

commands.payload:
Description:
  AutoMappic CLI - Mapping validation and visualization tool.

Usage:
  AutoMappic.Cli [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  validate <project>   Validates all mapping declarations in a project.
  visualize <project>  Generates a mapping graph visualization.

result.stdout:
Description:
  Validates all mapping declarations in a project.

Usage:
  AutoMappic.Cli validate <project> [options]

Arguments:
  <project>  The path to the .csproj file.

Options:
  --format <format>  The output format (text, json). [default: text]
  -?, -h, --help     Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Generates a mapping graph visualization.

Usage:
  AutoMappic.Cli visualize <project> [options]

Arguments:
  <project>  The path to the .csproj file.

Options:
  --format <format>  The visualization format (mermaid). [default: mermaid]
  -?, -h, --help     Show help and usage information
